global_production_variables.directorial_treatment: Cinematic lighting, clear coverage, natural performances.

Character_Narrator.description: Adult man in his thirties to forties, lean build, very pale skin, sharp cheekbones, dark close-cropped or neatly kept brown hair, dark intense eyes; clean-shaven or light stubble. Mid-19th-century domestic dress: dark waistcoat over a white or off-white shirt with open collar, dark trousers.
Character_Narrator.voice_profile: Adult male, medium-high pitch that tightens under stress; initially measured, calm, and persuasive, then quicker, louder, and fractured; same voice in on-camera address and V.O.
Character_Narrator.visual_lock: Same pale gaunt face, dark hair, and piercing eyes in every scene; never elderly. Distinct from the Old Man by age, dark hair, and lack of any pale-blue filmed eye.
Character_Narrator.performance_notes: Primary direct-address confessor: often faces and speaks to the implied viewer/camera; leans in; private asides and V.O. keep the same intimate listener relationship.

Character_Officer.description: Adult man in his thirties to forties, solid upright build, clear composed face, neatly trimmed brown hair, clean-shaven or tidy mustache. Mid-19th-century municipal/police dress: dark frock coat or uniform coat, waistcoat, high-collar shirt, dark trousers; modest badge or official trim if period-accurate.
Character_Officer.voice_profile: Adult male, medium pitch, even paced, civil and official energy without menace; same calm investigative tone throughout.
Character_Officer.visual_lock: Lead speaking officer: steady open face, brown hair, dark formal coat—distinct from the Narrator's paler gaunt look and from the other two officers' different hair and facial hair.
wardrobe_always: dark period frock or uniform coat
Character_Officer.performance_notes: Addresses the Narrator and fellow officers in-scene; pleasant professional eye-line, not confessional to camera.

Character_Old_Man.description: Elderly man, thin frail build, deeply lined face, sparse white or silver hair, pallid skin. One distinctive pale blue eye with a cloudy film, the other eye ordinary; sunken lids.
Character_Old_Man.voice_profile: Elderly male, thin reedy pitch, sparse dialogue if any; startled cry or groan energy, weak and brief; same aged timbre whenever he vocalizes.
Character_Old_Man.visual_lock: Constants: advanced age, frail thin frame, and the single pale blue filmed eye that must read clearly in close-up. Never young, never the Narrator's face. The distinctive eye remains dull blue with a visible veil/film.
Character_Old_Man.performance_notes: Observed object of the Narrator’s gaze; looks into darkness or toward sounds in the room, not to camera.

Character_Officer_Two.description: Adult man roughly thirties to forties, medium stocky build, broader jaw, darker nearly black hair, short side whiskers; calm watchful eyes. Matching mid-19th-century police/municipal dark coat, waistcoat, high-collar shirt, and dark trousers—same force as the other officers, different face.
Character_Officer_Two.voice_profile: Adult male, lower-medium pitch, sparse soft conversational energy when chatting; unhurried and mild.
Character_Officer_Two.visual_lock: Darker hair and side whiskers plus broader jaw distinguish him from the lead Officer and from Officer Three; never shares the Narrator's pale gaunt features.
Character_Officer_Two.performance_notes: In-scene only; chats and smiles with partners, eyes on Narrator and room, not the viewer.

Character_Officer_Three.description: Adult man roughly late twenties to late thirties, leaner taller build, lighter sandy or auburn hair, clean-shaven angular face, mild half-smile. Mid-19th-century police/municipal dark coat, waistcoat, high-collar shirt, and dark trousers.
Character_Officer_Three.voice_profile: Adult male, medium pitch, light pleasant chat energy; easy unhurried pace when he speaks at all.
Character_Officer_Three.visual_lock: Sandy/auburn hair, clean-shaven angular face, leaner taller frame; not pale-gaunt and not elderly.
Character_Officer_Three.performance_notes: In-scene observer-participant; pleasant smiles and partner-directed looks only.
